notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Anthony Kay. Mitch Garver to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, first baseman Munetaka Murakami to shortstop Colson Montgomery. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Mitch Garver to 2nd. Mitch Garver advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by first baseman Munetaka Murakami.
